purpose: Root layout: Inter font, dark theme, metadata, GlobalProvider wrapper
Landing page — Decide/Learn surface: hero, features, pricing, FAQ, social proof, CTA
Dashboard layout: sidebar nav + topbar + main content area. Wraps all dashboard pages with StoreProvider.
Dashboard home — Monitor surface: computed stat cards, charts from real data, recent activity feed
Backup Jobs CRUD list — Operate surface: data table, create/edit/delete, search, sort, filter
Verification Tests list — Operate surface: list, filter, view log, trigger manual test
Alerts list — Operate surface: list, acknowledge single/bulk
Settings — Configure surface: profile form, notification toggles, data export/import/reset
React Context + useReducer global state: all CRUD, seed data, localStorage sync, toast notifications
TypeScript interfaces for BackupJob, VerificationTest, Alert, AppSettings, state shapes
Utilities: formatDate, formatNumber, classNames, generateId, exportJSON, importJSON, computeStats
